ARTH718 Seminar in Medieval Art (3 Credits) Repeatable to: 9 credits.

ARTH719 Seminar in Italian Renaissance Art (3 Credits) Repeatable to: 9 credits.

ARTH728 Seminar in Fourteenth and Fifteenth-Century Northern European Art (3 Credits) Repeatable to: 9 credits.

ARTT426 Advanced Painting: Painting on Site I (3 Credits) Designed for Art and design, architecture, urban planning, and public engagement majors seeking to gain more experience in the public art process. Through public artworks, students will explore ethical methods of community engagement, mural design and production. This course will have 1-2 visiting artists give lectures and/or participate in a workshop. Prerequisite: ARTT320; or permission of the Art Department.

ARTH729 Seminar in Sixteenth-Century Northern European Art (3 Credits) Repeatable to: 9 credits.

ARTH738 Seminar in Seventeenth-Century Southern European Art (3 Credits) Repeatable to: 9 credits.

ARTH739 Seminar in Seventeenth-Century Northern European Art (3 Credits) Repeatable to: 9 credits.
